name: medical billing specialists in small clinics processing 10-20 claims/month tool
description: For medical billing specialists in small clinics processing 10-20 claims/month, high claim denials cause cash flow gaps. We automate resubmission queues instead of manual tracking with spreadsheets.
target_audience: medical billing specialists in small clinics processing 10-20 claims/month
problem_solved: High rate of claim denials causing delays in revenue cycle management.
features: manual entry of claim denial details
simple dashboard for tracking claim status

locked_fields.primary_problem: High rate of claim denials causing delays in revenue cycle management.
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For medical billing specialists in small clinics processing 10-20 claims/month, high claim denials cause cash flow gaps. We automate resubmission queues instead of manual tracking with spreadsheets.
locked_fields.current_alternative: manual tracking of claim denials and resubmissions using spreadsheets.
must_have_features: manual entry of claim denial details
simple dashboard for tracking claim status
